query:
UPDATE game_item_catalog SET 
  use_effect = '{"type":"enhance_scroll","scrollType":"weapon_scroll","description":"武器強化卷軸（白武卷）：標準強化+1"}',
  category = 'scroll',
  stackable = 1,
  stack_limit = 99
WHERE item_id = 'I_SCR_WPN';

UPDATE game_item_catalog SET 
  use_effect = '{"type":"enhance_scroll","scrollType":"armor_scroll","description":"防具強化卷軸（白防卷）：標準強化+1"}',
  category = 'scroll',
  stackable = 1,
  stack_limit = 99
WHERE item_id = 'I_SCR_ARM';

INSERT INTO game_item_catalog (item_id, name, description, category, rarity, wuxing, effect, use_effect, shop_price, stackable, stack_limit, in_normal_shop, in_spirit_shop, in_secret_shop, is_monster_drop, usable_in_battle, is_active, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES 
('I_SCR_WPN_B', '祝福的武器強化卷軸', '黃武卷：爆裝率減半，成功可+1~3級', 'scroll', 'rare', '金', '黃武卷：爆裝率減半，成功+1~3', '{"type":"enhance_scroll","scrollType":"blessed_weapon_scroll","description":"祝福的武器強化卷軸（黃武卷）：爆裝率減半，成功+1~3"}', 5000, 1, 99, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0, 1, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
('I_SCR_ARM_B', '祝福的防具強化卷軸', '黃防卷：爆裝率減半，成功可+1~3級', 'scroll', 'rare', '金', '黃防卷：爆裝率減半，成功+1~3', '{"type":"enhance_scroll","scrollType":"blessed_armor_scroll","description":"祝福的防具強化卷軸（黃防卷）：爆裝率減半，成功+1~3"}', 5000, 1, 99, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0, 1, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE 
  use_effect = VALUES(use_effect),
  name = VALUES(name),
  description = VALUES(description),
  category = VALUES(category);
